targets.rawQueryText: SELECT r.run_id, r.host, r.started_at, r.finished_at, CASE WHEN r.finished_at IS NULL THEN 'running' ELSE CAST((julianday(r.finished_at) - julianday(r.started_at)) * 86400 AS INTEGER) || 's' END AS duration, r.max_sde_date, r.candidates_source, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = r.run_id) AS processed, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = r.run_id AND status = 'ok') AS ok, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = r.run_id AND status != 'ok') AS failed, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reproduction_attempts WHERE run_id = r.run_id) AS attempts FROM runs r ORDER BY r.started_at DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT r.run_id, r.host, r.started_at, r.finished_at, CASE WHEN r.finished_at IS NULL THEN 'running' ELSE CAST((julianday(r.finished_at) - julianday(r.started_at)) * 86400 AS INTEGER) || 's' END AS duration, r.max_sde_date, r.candidates_source, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = r.run_id) AS processed, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = r.run_id AND status = 'ok') AS ok, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = r.run_id AND status != 'ok') AS failed, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reproduction_attempts WHERE run_id = r.run_id) AS attempts FROM runs r ORDER BY r.started_at DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT run_id, status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM drive_state GROUP BY run_id, status ORDER BY run_id DESC, count DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT run_id, status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM drive_state GROUP BY run_id, status ORDER BY run_id DESC, count DESC
